prompt: Add a hook useDeliveries() to fetch the current user's deliveries from /client-user/v1/deliveries and return loading, error, data
expected_avoid: fetch() native (portal uses configured axios client)
expected_use: axios via the existing utils/axios.ts client (cookie auth interceptor)
envelope destructure: { status: 200, message, data, pagination }
X-Channel / X-Api-Mode / X-Client-Time-Zone headers honored by the client
expected_pattern_ref: Adaptation Layer — next-portal-v2-web data fetch (rules L382); Per-service envelope discrimination — nodejs-core-service numeric status (rules L620); Refuse anti-pattern #3 TanStack (rules L579); Auth header injection (rules L561-564)
context_notes: portal-v2 talks to nodejs-core-service which uses numeric status field and top-level pagination. axios client at utils/axios.ts already injects auth cookie + Dash custom headers. Do NOT introduce TanStack/SWR — banned in all 5 FE repos.
